Description: Annual registration statement update for open-end mutual funds.
Certified shareholder report filed by registered management investment companies.
Annual report of proxy voting record for registered funds.
Quarterly report of equity holdings by institutional investment managers with over $100m AUM.
Monthly portfolio holdings report filed by registered open-end funds.
Annual census report providing structural and operational data about registered investment companies.
Registration statement for closed-end management investment companies.
Post-effective amendment to registration statement for open-end funds under the 1940 Act.
Annual update to Form ADV for registered investment advisers disclosing business practices and conflicts.
Reporting form for private fund advisers to provide systemic risk data to the SEC and FSOC.
Notice of exempt offering of securities filed within 15 days of first sale.
Passive beneficial ownership report for investors holding over 5% of a registered class.
Monthly report on client money and safe custody assets under the Client Assets Sourcebook.
Common Reporting framework for capital requirements under CRD IV/CRR.
Daily report of trades executed to the FCA to ensure market transparency under MiFID II.
Detailed reporting on fund exposures liquidity leverage and risk profiles under the AIFMD.
Daily reporting of OTC and exchange-traded derivative contracts to a registered trade repository.
Annual fitness and propriety certification for all Certified Persons under the Senior Managers and Certification Regime.
Internal Capital and Risk Assessment document required under IFPR for MiFID investment firms.
Biannual report of complaints received and resolved submitted to the FCA.
Annual confirmation that company details on the register are accurate including directors and shareholders.
Notification of changes to the register of Persons with Significant Control.
Statutory annual accounts filed with Companies House within 9 months of financial year end.
Quarterly VAT return submitted to HMRC reporting output and input tax.
Annual corporation tax return filed with HMRC within 12 months of the accounting period end.
Monthly Full Payment Submission reporting employee pay and deductions to HMRC in real time.
Financial reporting framework for credit institutions and investment firms under IFRS.
Quarterly pool and performance report filed by registered commodity pool operators with the NFA.
Statement of reporting trader identifying large position holders in CFTC-regulated markets.
Daily report of large trader positions in futures and options markets submitted to the CFTC.
Annual self-examination questionnaire submitted by NFA members to demonstrate ongoing compliance.
